title: SmokyCrispPretzel
description: A smoky and crispy midnight-craving Uruguayan dish featuring pretzels, prepared with sous-vide for egg-free-friendliness.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix the sea salt and smoked paprika together.
Once the smoky mixture is ready, add it to the pretzel pieces in a large zip-top bag.
Seal the bag and place the pretzels into the water bath for about 30 minutes.
After vacuum sealing, let the pretzels cool for about 15-20 minutes outside of the sous-vide chamber.
Once cooled, brush olive oil over them to make them extra crispy.
